$comment: Reusable instance skeleton (the new launch model). Copy this dir, set name/domain/models, drop reference content into kb/ (then `ratchet index kb`), and author action chains under flows/. Launch with `ratchet <this-dir>` or `ratchet <path-to-ratchet.json>`. workdir defaults to this folder; flows/tools/kb/schemas/samples default under it - add a dir field only to point elsewhere (e.g. a shared base).

domain: CHANGE_ME - one line: what this ICM is for
